processes.name: No Qualified Parts Detection
processes.description: Detection of No Qualifed Parts in different points of Operation
processes.notes: Two travel cards: Green (Factory Scrap, no validation needed.) Orange ( Providor Claim, need double check from PQA)

processes.name: NG Parts Detection (Body Shop )
processes.description: No Qualified Parts identified during Body Line Production
processes.notes: Two travel cards: Green (Factory Scrap, no validation needed.) Orange ( Providor Claim, need double check from PQA)

processes.name: NG Parts Detection (Trim Shop)
processes.description: No Qualified Parts identified during Trim Line Production
processes.notes: Two travel cards: Green (Factory Scrap, no validation needed.) Orange ( Providor Claim, need double check from PQA)

processes.name: NG Parts Detection( Reception  Area)
processes.description: No Qualified Parts identified during logistic operations (Reception, Conrainer Devannig, Handling Unit management)

processes.name: NG Parts Detection(Intralogistic Area)
processes.description: No Qualified Parts identified during intralosgitic operations (Replenishment, picking, kitting)

processes.name: NG Parts Movement
processes.description: Move Green Travel Card Parts to Scrap, Orange travel card Parts to Quarantine zone.
processes.notes: In case of Quarantine zone is not available, PQA tours across line site scrap area to perform the validation (once a shift). Under demand on logistic areas.

processes.name: Quarantine Zone management
processes.description: Quarantine area non qualified parts management.

processes.name: Goods Reception
processes.description: Reception of no qualified parts from different areas. Check for consistency of pyshical goods with travel card information.

processes.name: Providor Claim or Process Scrap
processes.description: Determine if is providor issue, or it is scrap during the factory process.

processes.name: Process Scrap management
processes.description: How to manage damanage generated by factory process.

processes.name: Damange level validation
processes.description: Check if the damange can be repaied or need to proced to scrap.

processes.name: Repair List
processes.description: List of parts from Quarantine zone able to repair to be used again for production.

processes.name: Scrap List
processes.description: List of parts from Quarantine zone to be scraped
processes.notes: The Enviroment team will separate the travel card from the parts to be scrapped and sent to logistic mail box (one for M0 and one for M1).  Logistic team builds up the scrap list base on the travel card input.

processes.name: Scrap Execution
processes.description: Process from Scrap list until Scrap execution

processes.name: Sales Order from DJV to MJV
processes.description: Create Sales order from DJV to MJV for parts and quantity listed in scrap list,

processes.name: Pay Invoice
processes.description: Pay the invoice order to DJV for the parts to be scrapped

processes.name: Goods Receive MJV
processes.description: Reception of to be scrapped goods form DJV to MJV.

processes.name: Inform Scrap 3rd Party
processes.description: Inform 3rd Party to collect scrap materials

processes.name: Receive Scrap Evidence
processes.description: Receive 3rd Party Scrap execution evidence

processes.name: Goods Issue Parts
processes.description: Approval of Purcahse orer release

processes.name: Rework Order
processes.description: Rework execution of no qualified parts that can be repaired to be used again for production

processes.name: Rework order planning
processes.description: Rework order planning for to be rework parts with estimated work date,

processes.name: Transfer request to rework area
processes.description: Transfer Request of No Qualied Parts from Quarantine zone to Repair Area

processes.name: Transfer Exceution
processes.description: Execution the Transfer form Qarantine zone to Repair Area

processes.name: Rework Execution
processes.description: Execution of Repair order

processes.name: Transfer Request to validate area
processes.description: Transfer request of Recover parts to PQA area for Quality Validation

processes.name: Trasnfer Execution
processes.description: Transfer Execution to Validation Area

processes.name: Recovered Parts Validation
processes.description: Validate if the recovered parts qualified or not.

processes.name: Move to scrap
processes.description: The recovered parts still not exceed quality standard. Add into scrap list

processes.name: Transfer Qualified Parts
processes.description: Transfer Request of Qualified Parts to Buffer stock

processes.name: Transfer Execution
processes.description: Move Parts to buffer stock

processes.name: Reception of recover stock
processes.description: Reception of Recover stock into buffer stock

processes.name: Claim Request Processing
processes.description: Claim Request management for Provider claim list parts

processes.name: Open Claim Request to Provider
processes.description: Raise Claim Request to Providor from claim list

processes.name: Scrap or Return of Old Part
processes.description: Scrap withinin the factory or return the part back to provider.

processes.name: New Part Request
processes.description: Request of replacement parts shipment

processes.name: Operation Cost Charge Request
processes.description: Request charge for operation cost.

processes.name: Providor Return Execution
processes.description: Execution of Return Parts to Provider

processes.name: Transfer Request of Return Parts
processes.description: Request the transfer of Return parts for issue out of factory

processes.name: Transfer Execution of Return Parts
processes.description: Move the Return parts to Loading area.

processes.name: Goods Issue of Return Parts
processes.description: Post Goods Issue for Return Parts when the tgoods are loaded and leaved factory

processes.name: Replacement Parts Reception
processes.description: Tracking of replacement parts from Provider to Factory

processes.name: Shipment tracking
processes.description: Receive shipment notification of provider replacement parts with key indicators: Shipment List, ETA

processes.name: Goods Reception in Factory
processes.description: Validate the material and quantity reception from Provider

processes.name: Customs Clearance
processes.description: Customs Clearance from 3rd Countries.

processes.name: Transfer to Safety Stock
processes.description: Transfer goods from reception are into Safety stock.
